families.family: Local Aukora Keychain broker (IDE + provider credentials)

provenance.note: Local-first secret broker: raw secret bytes live only in the OS credential store (macOS Keychain first; portable adapter boundary). Aukora holds only opaque references + scope/fingerprint/rotation/spend metadata. Loopback-only broker; short-lived scoped capability handles to IDE clients; explicit owner approval for create/replace/reveal-once/revoke/scope-widening; fail-closed when the OS keychain is unavailable. Raw secrets never enter GitHub, Convex, memory recall, model context, or receipts. Local-only phase; cloud later uses native secret managers, never plaintext sync.
